Michael Johnson
Columbus, OH

Summary
Dedicated and safety-conscious CDL-A driver with over 2 years of over-the-road (OTR) experience. Proven track record of timely deliveries and exceptional customer service. Committed to maintaining a clean driving record and ensuring compliance with DOT regulations. Seeking to leverage driving expertise to contribute to a reputable transportation company.

Experience

Long Haul Driver  
Blue Sky Trucking, Columbus, OH  
March 2021 - Present  
- Operated semi-truck and trailer for OTR routes covering 48 states, ensuring timely delivery of goods.  
- Maintained accurate logs of driving hours and vehicle inspections in compliance with DOT regulations.  
- Developed strong relationships with clients through excellent communication and service.

Regional Driver  
Fast Track Logistics, Dayton, OH  
January 2020 - February 2021  
- Completed regional deliveries throughout the Midwest, averaging 2,500 miles per week.  
- Assisted in loading and unloading freight, ensuring safe handling of cargo.  
- Achieved a clean driving record with no accidents or violations over the course of employment.

Certifications
- Class A Commercial Driver's License (CDL)  
- DOT Medical Card  

Skills
- Strong knowledge of safety regulations and DOT compliance  
- Excellent time management and organizational skills  
- Proficient in using electronic logging devices (ELDs)  
- Strong interpersonal and communication abilities

Education
High School Diploma  
Columbus High School, Columbus, OH  
Graduated May 2018
